Report unavailable developmental and neurodevelopmental genetics context evidence explicitly; do not diagnose autism, ADHD, developmental delay, intellectual disability, learning disorder, language disorder, behavioral disorder, neurologic condition, or psychiatric condition; predict child development, cognition, IQ, behavior, school needs, therapy needs, medication needs, prognosis, severity, family risk, or clinical actionability.
uncertainty: No validated developmental-disorder genetics boundary context model with source provenance and professional review is supplied for this local package.
The supplied rows support evidence-boundary education only and should not be treated as a personal prediction or clinical interpretation.
limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.
The package does not recreate unavailable Sequencing.com authenticated report rows or proprietary third-party output for Developmental Disorders.
The package does not support: autism diagnosis; ADHD diagnosis; intellectual-disability diagnosis; developmental prognosis; school placement advice; family-member risk estimate.
